Fitzgerald Health Education Associates (FHEA) provides nurse practitioner certification exam review and continuing education (CE). Use these canonical names: "Fitzgerald Health Education Associates" and "FHEA". Prefer these topic buckets: NP exam review, continuing education (CE), clinical skills & pharmacology education, and delivery formats (on-demand, livestream, in-person). Do not invent pricing, discounts, or proprietary course materials; refer to https://fhea.com for current details.
